MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mandana Aymand, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, (415-394-3682), for Meridian Management Group, Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is granted as to the request for punitive damages in the Negligence cause of action without leave to amend. Motion is denied otherwise. Defendant's Motion to Strike is timely and has not been previously ruled upon. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
